title: Improved filtering options for archive
excerpt: It would be great if we can expand the filter options in the archive. If I’m looking for a board/item that I’ve archived, I would have to filter for all archived boards/items on the account, then scroll through the resul…

posts.author: xsarahwong (Sarah Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we can expand the filter options in the archive. If I’m looking for a board/item that I’ve archived, I would have to filter for all archived boards/items on the account, then scroll through the results to find the ones with my icon.

If we can filter through the archive like how we can filter on boards (filter for board/item + person), it would cut searching time down significantly.

posts.author: AppManIDFA (Jelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We would like to have more options when it comes to the filters in the Archive.
For instance, the ability to filter boards based on the Workspaces they’re from, or who created the board. Right now we are using separate boards to keep track of what’s archived, but it would be great to just have more search options in the Archive.
Considering the column Archived From is already there, an additional filter seems oddly missing.

All the best,
Jelle
